# NorthstarLabs

> NorthstarLabs is a connected learning platform where structured courses, human coaching, live learning, community, and learner progress work together.

Canonical website: https://northstarlabs.co.za

Memory cue: Learn. Ask. Progress.

Brand promise: Courses for the path. Coaches for the roadblocks.

NorthstarLabs serves three audiences:

- Creators build branded academies, courses, programmes, communities, and learner journeys.
- Learners take practical courses, save progress, join live learning, earn certificates, and find personal help.
- Coaches publish discoverable profiles, set their own hourly rates, show credentials and availability, and receive protected enquiries.

The NorthstarLabs difference:

- A course gives a learner the path.
- A coach helps with the personal roadblock.
- The learning activity, live support, community, progress, ratings, and proof stay connected.
- If a suitable course or coach is not listed, a prospective user can submit a detailed request so NorthstarLabs can look for a credible match.

Available now:

- Free account creation for creator, coach, and learner paths
- Public course catalogue and branded academy storefronts
- Course authoring with text, protected video, downloads, sections, quizzes, and completion rules
- Learner progress, notes, bookmarks, assessments, and verifiable certificates
- Coach marketplace with topics, rates, availability, credentials, enquiries, and verified-session reviews
- Bundles, memberships, live sessions, community, email operations, reporting, integrations, and administration

Current commercial status:

- Free account creation and starter courses are available.
- Paid plan upgrades remain disabled until live billing completes final activation and transaction testing.

Important public pages:

- About NorthstarLabs: https://northstarlabs.co.za/about
- Goal-first Northstar Navigator: https://northstarlabs.co.za/find
- Course catalogue: https://northstarlabs.co.za/courses
- Coach marketplace: https://northstarlabs.co.za/tutors
- Terms: https://northstarlabs.co.za/legal/terms
- Privacy: https://northstarlabs.co.za/legal/privacy
- XML sitemap: https://northstarlabs.co.za/sitemap.xml

Brand spelling: NorthstarLabs
